//program
using IntegriteCBPFX.App;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Time;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using NLog;
using NLog.Extensions.Logging;

var logger = LogManager.GetCurrentClassLogger();

try
{
    var builder = Host.CreateApplicationBuilder(args);

    // Journalisation : NLog comme unique fournisseur, configuré depuis la section "NLog" d'appsettings.
    builder.Logging.ClearProviders();
    LogManager.Setup().LoadConfigurationFromSection(builder.Configuration);
    builder.Logging.AddNLog();

    VerificationCommandLine cli;
    try
    {
        cli = VerificationArgs.Parse(args);
    }
    catch (FormatException ex)
    {
        logger.Error(ex, "Arguments de ligne de commande invalides.");
        return ExitCodes.InvalidArguments;
    }

    // Services transverses + slice(s). Une date d'exécution forcée (rejeu) substitue l'horloge :
    // le jour « J » bascule sur cette date, l'heure des horodatages reste réelle.
    if (cli.ExecutionDate is { } executionDate)
    {
        logger.Info("Date d'exécution forcée à {0:yyyy-MM-dd} (rejeu).", executionDate);
        builder.Services.AddSingleton<IClock>(new FixedDateClock(executionDate));
    }
    else
    {
        builder.Services.AddSingleton<IClock, SystemClock>();
    }

    builder.Services.AddVerificationFeature(builder.Configuration);

    using var host = builder.Build();

    // Annulation propre sur Ctrl+C / arrêt Control-M.
    using var cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
    Console.CancelKeyPress += (_, eventArgs) =>
    {
        eventArgs.Cancel = true;
        cts.Cancel();
    };

    using var scope = host.Services.CreateScope();
    var handler = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<RunVerificationHandler>();

    var result = await handler.HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(cli.Mode), cts.Token);

    return ExitCodes.FromResult(result);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    logger.Fatal(ex, "Échec inattendu de la vérification.");
    return ExitCodes.UnexpectedError;
}
finally
{
    // Vide les buffers des targets NLog (important pour un batch court).
    LogManager.Shutdown();
}


//end program



//RunVerification
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Text.Json;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Mode d'exécution déterminant la plage de dates de trade à traiter.</summary>
public enum VerificationMode
{
    /// <summary>Veille : fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    Veille,

    /// <summary>Journée courante : fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    JourneeCourante,
}

/// <summary>Commande : lancer la vérification d'intégrité pour un mode donné.</summary>
/// <remarks>Un rejeu sur une date passée se fait en substituant l'horloge (<c>FixedDateClock</c>),
/// pas via cette commande : le jour « J » découle de <c>IClock</c>.</remarks>
public sealed record RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode Mode);

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run, utilisé par le host pour le code de sortie.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationResult
{
    public required Guid RunId { get; init; }
    public required VerificationStatus Status { get; init; }
    public int CbpTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int FxTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int AnomalyCount { get; init; }
    public string? FailureReason { get; init; }

    public bool Succeeded => Status == VerificationStatus.Completed;
    public bool HasAnomalies => AnomalyCount > 0;

    public static RunVerificationResult FromRun(VerificationRun run) => new()
    {
        RunId = run.Id,
        Status = run.Status,
        CbpTransactionCount = run.CbpTransactionCount,
        FxTransactionCount = run.FxTransactionCount,
        AnomalyCount = run.AnomalyCount,
        FailureReason = run.FailureReason,
    };
}

/// <summary>
/// Use-case central : extrait CBP + FXSentry pour la plage du mode, délègue le
/// rapprochement au <see cref="VerificationEngine"/>, persiste, et notifie en cas d'anomalies.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationHandler(
    ICbpTransactionSource cbpSource,
    IFxSentryTransactionSource fxSource,
    VerificationEngine engine,
    IVerificationStore store,
    INotifier notifier,
    IClock clock,
    ILogger<RunVerificationHandler> logger)
{
    public async Task<RunVerificationResult> HandleAsync(RunVerificationCommand command, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(command);

        var today = DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.Date);
        var range = ResolveRange(command.Mode, today);

        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), range.ToTradeDate, clock.Current);
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        using var scope = logger.BeginScope("Run {RunId} - {Mode} [{From}..{To}]", run.Id, command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate);
        logger.LogInformation(
            "Démarrage de la vérification — mode {Mode}, tradeDate {From}..{To} (run {RunId}).",
            command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate, run.Id);

        IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbpTransactions;
        IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fxTransactions;
        try
        {
            cbpTransactions = await cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("CBP : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", cbpTransactions.Count);

            fxTransactions = await fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("FXSentry : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", fxTransactions.Count);
        }
        catch (TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex)
        {
            run.Fail(clock.Current, $"Source {ex.FailedSource} indisponible : {ex.Message}");
            await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogError(ex, "Source {Source} indisponible — run {RunId} en échec après {Elapsed}.", ex.FailedSource, run.Id, stopwatch.Elapsed);
            return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
        }

        var anomalies = engine.Verify(cbpTransactions, fxTransactions, clock.Current);

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Rapprochement : {Total} anomalie(s) — Tx CBP absentes FX={CbpMissing}, Tx FX absentes CBP={FxMissing}, écarts champs={FieldDiffs}.",
            anomalies.Count,
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.CbpNotInFxSentry),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FxSentryNotInCbp),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences));

        LogTopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        await store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, cancellationToken);
        run.Complete(clock.Current, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count, anomalies.Count);
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);

        if (anomalies.Count > 0)
        {
            await notifier.NotifyAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("Back-Office notifié ({Count} anomalie(s)).", anomalies.Count);
        }

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Vérification terminée — statut {Status}, {AnomalyCount} anomalie(s), durée {Elapsed}.",
            run.Status, anomalies.Count, stopwatch.Elapsed);

        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    /// <summary>Journalise les 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart (anomalies de code 3).</summary>
    private void LogTopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        var topFields = anomalies
            .Where(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences && a.ChampsErreurs is not null)
            .SelectMany(a => JsonSerializer.Deserialize<string[]>(a.ChampsErreurs!) ?? [])
            .GroupBy(field => field, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .OrderByDescending(group => group.Count())
            .ThenBy(group => group.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Take(5)
            .Select(group => $"{group.Key}={group.Count()}")
            .ToArray();

        if (topFields.Length > 0)
        {
            logger.LogInformation("Top champs en écart : {TopFields}.", string.Join(", ", topFields));
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Résout la plage de dates de trade selon le mode.</summary>
    public static VerificationDateRange ResolveRange(VerificationMode mode, DateOnly today) => mode switch
    {
        VerificationMode.Veille => new VerificationDateRange(today.AddDays(-1), today),
        VerificationMode.JourneeCourante => new VerificationDateRange(today, today),
        _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(mode)),
    };
}


//end RunVerification


//verificationArgs
using System.Globalization;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App;

/// <summary>
/// Analyse des arguments de ligne de commande passés par Control-M.
/// </summary>
/// <remarks>
/// Usage :
///   IntegriteCBPFX                          -> mode Veille (défaut), date = aujourd'hui
///   IntegriteCBPFX Veille                   -> fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = J
///   IntegriteCBPFX JourneeCourante          -> fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = J
///   IntegriteCBPFX --mode JourneeCourante   -> idem (forme nommée ; « = » accepté)
///   IntegriteCBPFX Veille 20260615          -> date d'exécution forcée : J = 2026-06-15 (rejeu)
///   IntegriteCBPFX --date 20260615          -> idem (forme nommée ; « = » accepté), mode Veille
///
/// La date (facultative, format <c>yyyyMMdd</c>) remplace « aujourd'hui » (J) pour le calcul
/// de la plage de trade-dates. Les horodatages d'audit (StartedAt, DateCreationErreur) restent
/// à l'heure RÉELLE d'exécution.
/// </remarks>
public static class VerificationArgs
{
    private const string DateFormat = "yyyyMMdd";

    /// <summary>Résout le mode et la date d'exécution optionnelle à partir des arguments.</summary>
    /// <exception cref="FormatException">Mode non reconnu ou date au mauvais format.</exception>
    public static VerificationCommandLine Parse(string[] args)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(args);

        var positionals = PositionalTokens(args);
        return new VerificationCommandLine(
            ResolveMode(args, positionals),
            ResolveExecutionDate(args, positionals));
    }

    private static VerificationMode ResolveMode(string[] args, List<string> positionals)
    {
        // Forme nommée « --mode », sinon premier positionnel qui n'est pas une date.
        var raw = ExtractFlag(args, "--mode") ?? positionals.FirstOrDefault(t => !LooksLikeDate(t));
        if (raw is null)
        {
            return VerificationMode.Veille;
        }

        if (!Enum.TryParse<VerificationMode>(raw, ignoreCase: true, out var mode))
        {
            throw new FormatException(
                $"Mode invalide : « {raw} ». Valeurs attendues : {nameof(VerificationMode.Veille)}, {nameof(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante)}.");
        }

        return mode;
    }

    private static DateOnly? ResolveExecutionDate(string[] args, List<string> positionals)
    {
        // Forme nommée « --date », sinon premier positionnel à 8 chiffres.
        var raw = ExtractFlag(args, "--date") ?? positionals.FirstOrDefault(LooksLikeDate);
        if (raw is null)
        {
            return null;
        }

        if (!DateOnly.TryParseExact(raw, DateFormat, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, out var date))
        {
            throw new FormatException(
                $"Date d'exécution invalide : « {raw} ». Format attendu : {DateFormat} (ex. 20260615).");
        }

        return date;
    }

    /// <summary>Tokens positionnels, en sautant les flags « --x » et leur valeur « --x valeur ».</summary>
    private static List<string> PositionalTokens(string[] args)
    {
        var positionals = new List<string>();
        for (var i = 0; i < args.Length; i++)
        {
            var arg = args[i];
            if (arg.StartsWith("--", StringComparison.Ordinal))
            {
                if (!arg.Contains('=') && i + 1 < args.Length)
                {
                    i++; // « --flag valeur » : la valeur n'est pas un positionnel
                }

                continue;
            }

            if (!arg.StartsWith('-'))
            {
                positionals.Add(arg);
            }
        }

        return positionals;
    }

    /// <summary>Lit un flag « --x=valeur » ou « --x valeur » (insensible à la casse).</summary>
    private static string? ExtractFlag(string[] args, string flag)
    {
        var prefix = flag + "=";
        for (var i = 0; i < args.Length; i++)
        {
            var arg = args[i];
            if (arg.StartsWith(prefix, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return arg[prefix.Length..];
            }

            if (arg.Equals(flag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && i + 1 < args.Length)
            {
                return args[i + 1];
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    /// <summary>Heuristique de désambiguïsation positionnelle : 8 chiffres ⇒ date yyyyMMdd, sinon mode.</summary>
    private static bool LooksLikeDate(string token) => token.Length == 8 && token.All(char.IsAsciiDigit);
}

/// <summary>Arguments analysés : mode + date d'exécution optionnelle (<c>null</c> = aujourd'hui).</summary>
public sealed record VerificationCommandLine(VerificationMode Mode, DateOnly? ExecutionDate);

//end VerificationArgs


//FixedDateClockTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Time;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.SharedKernel;

/// <summary>Horloge de rejeu : date EXACTEMENT celle saisie, à l'heure locale réelle.</summary>
public sealed class FixedDateClockTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void Current_Uses_Exactly_The_Entered_Date()
    {
        var clock = new FixedDateClock(new DateOnly(2026, 1, 15));

        // La date traitée est EXACTEMENT celle saisie, indépendamment du fuseau.
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 1, 15), DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.DateTime));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Current_Keeps_Real_Local_Time()
    {
        var clock = new FixedDateClock(new DateOnly(2026, 1, 15));

        var before = DateTimeOffset.Now;
        var current = clock.Current;
        var after = DateTimeOffset.Now;

        // Heure réelle locale (pas figée à minuit, pas UTC).
        // NB : fenêtre [before, after] valable hors passage de minuit pendant le test.
        Assert.InRange(current.TimeOfDay, before.TimeOfDay, after.TimeOfDay);
        Assert.Equal(before.Offset, current.Offset);
    }
}

//end FixedDateClockTests

//VerificationStore
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Persistance Dapper des résultats (run + anomalies) dans le schéma integrite (objets CBP_*_FACT).
/// Les tables sont créées par les DBA via les scripts de db/ — l'appli n'exécute que des INSERT/UPDATE.
/// </summary>
public sealed class VerificationStore(IAppDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory, ILogger<VerificationStore> logger) : IVerificationStore
{
    private const string ExistsRunSql =
        "SELECT COUNT(1) FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT WHERE Id = @Id;";

    private const string InsertRunSql =
        """
        INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT
            (Id, BusinessDate, Status, StartedAt, CompletedAt, CbpTransactionCount, FxTransactionCount, AnomalyCount, FailureReason)
        VALUES
            (@Id, @BusinessDate, @Status, @StartedAt, @CompletedAt, @CbpTransactionCount, @FxTransactionCount, @AnomalyCount, @FailureReason);
        """;

    private const string UpdateRunSql =
        """
        UPDATE integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT
        SET Status = @Status,
            CompletedAt = @CompletedAt,
            CbpTransactionCount = @CbpTransactionCount,
            FxTransactionCount = @FxTransactionCount,
            AnomalyCount = @AnomalyCount,
            FailureReason = @FailureReason
        WHERE Id = @Id;
        """;

    private const string InsertAnomalySql =
        """
        INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT
            (Id, DateCreationErreur, IdCBPTransaction, IdFxSentryTransaction, CodeErreur, DescriptionErreur, ChampsErreurs)
        VALUES
            (@Id, @DateCreationErreur, @IdCBPTransaction, @IdFxSentryTransaction, @CodeErreur, @DescriptionErreur, @ChampsErreurs);
        """;

    public async Task SaveRunAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(run);

        var parameters = new
        {
            run.Id,
            run.BusinessDate,
            Status = run.Status.ToString(),
            run.StartedAt,
            run.CompletedAt,
            run.CbpTransactionCount,
            run.FxTransactionCount,
            run.AnomalyCount,
            run.FailureReason,
        };

        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();

        var exists = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>(
            new CommandDefinition(ExistsRunSql, new { run.Id }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        var sql = exists > 0 ? UpdateRunSql : InsertRunSql;
        await connection.ExecuteAsync(new CommandDefinition(sql, parameters, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        logger.LogDebug("Run {RunId} {Action} (statut {Status}).", run.Id, exists > 0 ? "mis à jour" : "inséré", run.Status);
    }

    public async Task AddAnomaliesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(anomalies);
        if (anomalies.Count == 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        // Dapper exécute l'INSERT une fois par élément de la séquence.
        var rows = anomalies.Select(a => new
        {
            a.Id,
            a.DateCreationErreur,
            a.IdCBPTransaction,
            a.IdFxSentryTransaction,
            CodeErreur = ToDbCode(a.CodeErreur),
            a.DescriptionErreur,
            a.ChampsErreurs,
        });

        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
        var inserted = await connection.ExecuteAsync(new CommandDefinition(InsertAnomalySql, rows, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));

        logger.LogDebug("{Count} anomalie(s) persistée(s).", inserted);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Valeur persistée de la colonne <c>CodeErreur</c> — contrat STABLE lu par le Back-Office
    /// (via Denodo). Découplé du nom de l'enum pour éviter qu'un renommage C# ne casse la base.
    /// </summary>
    private static string ToDbCode(AnomalyCode code) => code switch
    {
        AnomalyCode.CbpNotInFxSentry => "CBP_ABSENTE_FX",
        AnomalyCode.FxSentryNotInCbp => "FX_ABSENTE_CBP",
        AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences => "CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS",
        _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(code), code, "Code d'anomalie non mappé."),
    };
}

//end VerificationStore
// VerificationStoreTests
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Common.Persistence;

/// <summary>
/// Tests de persistance Dapper (VerificationStore) sur SQLite (schéma integrite) :
/// round-trip réel via SQL, comme en SQL Server.
/// </summary>
public sealed class VerificationStoreTests : IDisposable
{
    private static readonly DateTimeOffset Now = new(2026, 5, 4, 8, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);

    private readonly SqliteIntegriteDatabase _db = new();
    private readonly VerificationStore _store;

    public VerificationStoreTests() => _store = new VerificationStore(_db, NullLogger<VerificationStore>.Instance);

    public void Dispose() => _db.Dispose();

    [Fact]
    public async Task SaveRunAsync_Inserts_New_Run()
    {
        // Arrange
        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4), Now);
        run.Complete(Now.AddMinutes(2), cbpCount: 10, fxCount: 12, anomalyCount: 3);

        // Act
        await _store.SaveRunAsync(run, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        await using var connection = _db.Create();
        var status = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<string>(
            "SELECT Status FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT WHERE Id = @Id", new { run.Id });
        var anomalyCount = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>(
            "SELECT AnomalyCount FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT WHERE Id = @Id", new { run.Id });
        Assert.Equal("Completed", status);
        Assert.Equal(3, anomalyCount);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task SaveRunAsync_Updates_Existing_Run()
    {
        // Arrange — run inséré une 1re fois (Running).
        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4), Now);
        await _store.SaveRunAsync(run, CancellationToken.None);

        // Act — run clôturé puis ré-enregistré (entité détachée → upsert via UPDATE).
        run.Complete(Now.AddMinutes(1), cbpCount: 5, fxCount: 5, anomalyCount: 0);
        await _store.SaveRunAsync(run, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert — une seule ligne, statut mis à jour.
        await using var connection = _db.Create();
        var rowCount = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>("SELECT COUNT(1) FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT");
        var status = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<string>(
            "SELECT Status FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT WHERE Id = @Id", new { run.Id });
        Assert.Equal(1, rowCount);
        Assert.Equal("Completed", status);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task AddAnomaliesAsync_Persists_All_Codes()
    {
        // Arrange — une anomalie de chaque code.
        var anomalies = new[]
        {
            AnomalyTransaction.CbpNotInFxSentry("T1", Now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FxSentryNotInCbp("FX1", Now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("T2", "FX2", ["status", "farDateDetail.tradeRate"], Now),
        };

        // Act
        await _store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        await using var connection = _db.Create();
        var total = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>("SELECT COUNT(1) FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT");
        var idCbpForCode1 = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<string>(
            "SELECT IdCBPTransaction FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT WHERE CodeErreur = 'CBP_ABSENTE_FX'");
        var champsForCode3 = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<string>(
            "SELECT ChampsErreurs FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT WHERE CodeErreur = 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS'");
        Assert.Equal(3, total);
        Assert.Equal("T1", idCbpForCode1);
        Assert.Contains("farDateDetail.tradeRate", champsForCode3);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task AddAnomaliesAsync_With_Empty_Collection_Persists_Nothing()
    {
        // Arrange — rien à persister.

        // Act
        await _store.AddAnomaliesAsync([], CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        await using var connection = _db.Create();
        var total = await connection.ExecuteScalarAsync<long>("SELECT COUNT(1) FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT");
        Assert.Equal(0, total);
    }
}

//end VerificationStoreTests

//SEED
GO
SET NOCOUNT ON;
SET XACT_ABORT ON;

BEGIN TRANSACTION;

-- --- Purge des lignes de test (préfixes GUID dédiés ; CAST→LIKE, collation CI) ---
DELETE FROM integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT    WHERE CAST(Id AS char(36)) LIKE 'A0000000-0000-0000-0000-%';
DELETE FROM integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT WHERE CAST(Id AS char(36)) LIKE 'B0000000-0000-0000-0000-%';

-- --- Anomalies (15) — écrites EN PREMIER, comme l'appli -----------------------
-- Réparties pour réconcilier les AnomalyCount des runs ci-dessous.
INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT
    (Id, DateCreationErreur, IdCBPTransaction, IdFxSentryTransaction, CodeErreur, DescriptionErreur, ChampsErreurs)
VALUES
    -- 2026-06-02 → run ...002 (2 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '2026-06-02T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-0201', NULL,      'CBP_ABSENTE_FX',    'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', '2026-06-02T22:01:05+02:00', 'CBP-0202', 'FX-0202', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',  '["comment"]'),

    -- 2026-06-05 → run ...005 (5 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', '2026-06-05T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-0501', NULL,      'CBP_ABSENTE_FX',    'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', '2026-06-05T22:01:02+02:00', NULL,       'FX-0502', 'FX_ABSENTE_CBP',    'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005', '2026-06-05T22:01:04+02:00', 'CBP-0503', 'FX-0503', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 2 champ(s).',  '["status","valueDate"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000006', '2026-06-05T22:01:06+02:00', 'CBP-0504', 'FX-0504', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 4 champ(s).',  '["tradeRate","salesMargin","farDateDetail.tradeRate","farDateDetail.salesMargin"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000007', '2026-06-05T22:01:08+02:00', 'CBP-0505', 'FX-0505', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',  '["currency1Amt"]'),

    -- 2026-06-08 → run ...006 (1 anomalie)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000008', '2026-06-08T22:00:50+02:00', NULL,       'FX-0801', 'FX_ABSENTE_CBP',    'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.', NULL),

    -- 2026-06-12 → run ...010 (4 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000009', '2026-06-12T22:01:00+02:00', 'CBP-1201', NULL,      'CBP_ABSENTE_FX',    'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010', '2026-06-12T22:01:03+02:00', 'CBP-1202', 'FX-1202', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 3 champ(s).',  '["tradeAction","currency1Amt","currency2Amt"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000011', '2026-06-12T22:01:06+02:00', 'CBP-1203', 'FX-1203', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 1 champ(s).',  '["tradeDate"]'),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000012', '2026-06-12T22:01:09+02:00', NULL,       'FX-1204', 'FX_ABSENTE_CBP',    'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.', NULL),

    -- 2026-06-15 → run ...011 (3 anomalies)
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000013', '2026-06-15T22:02:00+02:00', 'CBP-1001', NULL,      'CBP_ABSENTE_FX',    'Transaction CBP absente de FXSentry.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000014', '2026-06-15T22:02:10+02:00', NULL,       'FX-2002', 'FX_ABSENTE_CBP',    'Transaction FXSentry absente de CBP.', NULL),
    ('B0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000015', '2026-06-15T22:02:20+02:00', 'CBP-1003', 'FX-3003', 'CHAMPS_DIFFERENTS', 'Écart(s) détecté(s) sur 3 champ(s).',  '["status","tradeRate","farDateDetail.salesMargin"]');

-- --- Runs de vérification (12) — écrits ENSUITE, comme l'appli ----------------
INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT
    (Id, BusinessDate, Status, StartedAt, CompletedAt, CbpTransactionCount, FxTransactionCount, AnomalyCount, FailureReason)
VALUES
    -- Terminés SANS anomalie (cas nominal).
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '2026-06-01', 'Completed', '2026-06-01T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-01T22:01:45+02:00', 1102, 1102, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', '2026-06-04', 'Completed', '2026-06-04T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-04T22:01:30+02:00', 1203, 1203, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000007', '2026-06-09', 'Completed', '2026-06-09T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-09T22:01:20+02:00', 1011, 1011, 0, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000009', '2026-06-11', 'Completed', '2026-06-11T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-11T22:01:55+02:00', 1255, 1255, 0, NULL),

    -- Terminés AVEC anomalies (AnomalyCount = nb d'anomalies du même jour, cf. plus haut).
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', '2026-06-02', 'Completed', '2026-06-02T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-02T22:01:40+02:00', 1156, 1155, 2, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005', '2026-06-05', 'Completed', '2026-06-05T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-05T22:02:10+02:00', 1340, 1338, 5, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000006', '2026-06-08', 'Completed', '2026-06-08T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-08T22:01:15+02:00', 980,  981,  1, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010', '2026-06-12', 'Completed', '2026-06-12T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-12T22:02:05+02:00', 1290, 1289, 4, NULL),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000011', '2026-06-15', 'Completed', '2026-06-15T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-15T22:02:30+02:00', 1250, 1249, 3, NULL),

    -- En ÉCHEC (motifs variés) — FailureReason renseigné.
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', '2026-06-03', 'Failed', '2026-06-03T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-03T22:00:08+02:00', 0, 0, 0, 'API CBP indisponible (HTTP 503).'),
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000008', '2026-06-10', 'Failed', '2026-06-10T22:00:00+02:00', '2026-06-10T22:00:05+02:00', 0, 0, 0, 'Base FXSentry inaccessible.'),

    -- EN COURS (CompletedAt NULL) — exerce le chemin « run non clôturé ».
    ('A0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000012', '2026-06-16', 'Running', '2026-06-16T22:00:00+02:00', NULL, 0, 0, 0, NULL);

COMMIT TRANSACTION;

PRINT 'Seed integrite.* : 15 anomalie(s) + 12 run(s) insérés.';
GO
//END SEED


//SqliteIntegriteDatabase
using System.Data.Common;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using Microsoft.Data.Sqlite;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>
/// Base SQLite (fichiers temporaires) exposant un schéma « integrite » via ATTACH, pour
/// tester les requêtes Dapper qualifiées <c>integrite.CBP_*</c> comme en SQL Server.
/// Implémente <see cref="IAppDbConnectionFactory"/> : injectable dans le store.
/// Pooling désactivé → chaque connexion ré-attache proprement et se ferme.
/// </summary>
public sealed class SqliteIntegriteDatabase : IAppDbConnectionFactory, IDisposable
{
    private readonly string _mainPath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"integ_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");
    private readonly string _integritePath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"integrite_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");

    public SqliteIntegriteDatabase()
    {
        using var connection = OpenWithIntegriteSchema();
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText =
            """
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT (
                Id                    TEXT    NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                DateCreationErreur    TEXT    NOT NULL,
                IdCBPTransaction      TEXT    NULL,
                IdFxSentryTransaction TEXT    NULL,
                CodeErreur            TEXT    NOT NULL,
                DescriptionErreur     TEXT    NOT NULL,
                ChampsErreurs         TEXT    NULL
            );
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT (
                Id                  TEXT    NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                BusinessDate        TEXT    NOT NULL,
                Status              TEXT    NOT NULL,
                StartedAt           TEXT    NOT NULL,
                CompletedAt         TEXT    NULL,
                CbpTransactionCount INTEGER NOT NULL,
                FxTransactionCount  INTEGER NOT NULL,
                AnomalyCount        INTEGER NOT NULL,
                FailureReason       TEXT    NULL
            );
            """;
        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
    }

    public DbConnection Create() => OpenWithIntegriteSchema();

    private SqliteConnection OpenWithIntegriteSchema()
    {
        var connection = new SqliteConnection($"Data Source={_mainPath};Pooling=False");
        connection.Open();
        using var attach = connection.CreateCommand();
        attach.CommandText = $"ATTACH DATABASE '{_integritePath.Replace('\\', '/')}' AS integrite;";
        attach.ExecuteNonQuery();
        return connection;
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        TryDelete(_mainPath);
        TryDelete(_integritePath);

        static void TryDelete(string path)
        {
            try
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    File.Delete(path);
                }
            }
            catch (IOException)
            {
                // Fichier temporaire encore verrouillé : sans gravité pour les tests.
            }
        }
    }
}

//end SqliteIntegriteDatabase
